title: Domain
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Domain''' was what the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] called a clan or family. Domains were often restricted to one caste, though an individual might enter a different caste. Rivalry between Domains was often intense, and reached its peak in the [[Cremlevian War]], which rendered the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy]] uninhabitable. While they never experienced such fierce competition after the war, violence remained the preferred method of settling disputes.
